entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop known for its adaptability to dry areas of the semiarid tropics.

entities.name: TILLERING
entities.description: The production of side shoots or tillers from the base of the plant.

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Computational models used to simulate the growth, development, and yield of crops.

entities.name: LEAF AREA MODULE
entities.description: A specific component of a simulation model that dynamically simulates crop leaf area.

entities.name: CROP LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves of the crop.

entities.name: INTER-AXIS COMPETITION FOR LIGHT
entities.description: The competition between different axes of the plant for access to sunlight.

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the plant life cycle.

entities.name: TILLERING HABIT
entities.description: The characteristic pattern of tiller production in a plant.

entities.name: WELL-WATERED AND WELL-FERTILIZED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions providing optimal water and nutrients.

entities.name: PLANT DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants grown per unit area.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research experiments were conducted.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in Andhra Pradesh, India, where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: JODHPUR
entities.description: A location in Rajasthan, India, where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: PRIMARY BASAL TILLERS
entities.description: The number of tillers originating from the primary base of the plant.

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION
entities.description: The developmental stage when the panicle begins to form.

entities.name: DAYLENGTH
entities.description: The amount of time a plant is exposed to light in a 24-hour period.

entities.name: LEAF INITIATION RATE
entities.description: The rate at which new leaves are produced.

entities.name: LEAF AND TILLER APPEARANCE RATE
entities.description: The rate at which leaves and tillers emerge.

entities.name: LEAF SENESCENCE RATE
entities.description: The rate at which leaves age and die.

entities.name: LEAF SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of individual leaves.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVE TILLER NUMBER
entities.description: The number of tillers that successfully produce a panicle or grain.

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD
entities.description: The duration of light exposure that triggers physiological responses.

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an individual organism or cultivar.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A dimensionless quantity that characterizes canopy structure, defined as the one-sided green leaf area per unit ground surface area.
